title: selaginella ciliaris
intro: Selaginella ciliaris, also known as the cilia spikemoss or cilia spike moss, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella ciliaris include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and alleviating symptoms of fever and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
